sqlMap.select: select * from ProdecessorFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into ProdecessorFirmLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey IsERPPurchased FirmName TypeOfEntity DissolutionDate NumberOfAttorneyAtDiss NumberOfAttorneyAtApplFirm InsurerAtDissolution ERPExpDate LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp DateOfAcquisation ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #IsERPPurchased# #FirmName# #TypeOfEntity# #DissolutionDate# #NumberOfAttorneyAtDiss# #NumberOfAttorneyAtApplFirm# #InsurerAtDissolution# #ERPExpDate# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #DateOfAcquisation# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('ProdecessorFirmLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select ProdecessorFirmKey, IsERPPurchased, FirmName, TypeOfEntity, DissolutionDate, NumberOfAttorneyAtDiss, NumberOfAttorneyAtApplFirm, InsurerAtDissolution, ERPExpDate, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, DateOfAcquisation, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ProdecessorFirmLW where ProdecessorFirmKey = #ProdecessorFirmKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update ProdecessorFirmLW set
IsERPPurchased = #IsERPPurchased# IsERPPurchased = null FirmName = #FirmName# FirmName = null TypeOfEntity = #TypeOfEntity# TypeOfEntity = null DissolutionDate = #DissolutionDate# DissolutionDate = null NumberOfAttorneyAtDiss = #NumberOfAttorneyAtDiss# NumberOfAttorneyAtDiss = null NumberOfAttorneyAtApplFirm = #NumberOfAttorneyAtApplFirm# NumberOfAttorneyAtApplFirm = null InsurerAtDissolution = #InsurerAtDissolution# InsurerAtDissolution = null ERPExpDate = #ERPExpDate# ERPExpDate = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null DateOfAcquisation = #DateOfAcquisation# DateOfAcquisation = null
where ProdecessorFirmKey = #ProdecessorFirmKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from ProdecessorFirmLW where ProdecessorFirmKey = #ProdecessorFirmKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from ProdecessorFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select ProdecessorFirmKey, IsERPPurchased, FirmName, TypeOfEntity, DissolutionDate, NumberOfAttorneyAtDiss, NumberOfAttorneyAtApplFirm, InsurerAtDissolution, ERPExpDate, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, DateOfAcquisation, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ProdecessorFirmLW where ProdecessorFirmKey = #ProdecessorFirmKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select ProdecessorFirmKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, IsERPPurchased, FirmName, TypeOfEntity, DissolutionDate, NumberOfAttorneyAtDiss, NumberOfAttorneyAtApplFirm, InsurerAtDissolution, ERPExpDate, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, DateOfAcquisation from ProdecessorFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
